name: Table

unions.name: Row
unions.comment: Embed the data with row states.

aliases.name: ColumnInternal
aliases.comment:
sortable  : could be sortable
  indexable : indexable for search filtering
  hidable   : selectColumns options must be true
aliases.type: { name : String, getValue : a -> String, headerView : (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg), cellView : a -> (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg), width : String, sortable : Bool, indexable : Bool, hidable : Bool }

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Configuration of table.

Table --- msg ---> Parent
        ( pipe )
aliases.type: { pipe : State -> msg, getRowId : a -> String, columns : List (Column a msg), toolbar : ToolbarConfig msg, footerView : Html msg }

aliases.name: State
aliases.type: { sortedColumn : ( ColumnName, SortStatus ), selected : Dict String Bool, search : String, hidedColumns : List ColumnName }

aliases.name: ToolbarConfig
aliases.type: { search : Bool, selectColumns : Bool, actions : List (ActionConfig msg) }

values.name: actionDefault
values.comment:
Helper to create an action configuration with the color of Bootstrap
(primary, success, danger, ...) and the icon of font-awesome (plus, minus, ...).

Example:

  actionDefault "success" "lock"
values.type: msg -> String -> String -> String -> ActionConfig msg

values.name: checkRowState
values.type: String -> State -> Bool -> State

values.name: checkboxColumn
values.comment: Column with checkbox to select multiple rows.
values.type: (a -> String) -> Column a msg

values.name: customColumn
values.comment: Column width custom header and cell rendering.
values.type: String -> String -> (a -> b) -> Html msg -> (b -> Html msg) -> Column a msg

values.name: defaultFooter
values.type: Html msg

values.name: getSelectedRows
values.comment: Return the selected rows of table.
values.type: (a -> String) -> State -> List (Row a) -> List a

values.name: hideColumn
values.type: String -> State -> State

values.name: initRows
values.type: (a -> String) -> List a -> ( State, List (Row a) )

values.name: initState
values.type: State

values.name: invisibleColumn
values.type: String -> (a -> String) -> Column a msg

values.name: maybe
values.type: Bool -> a -> Maybe a

values.name: nextSortStatus
values.type: SortStatus -> SortStatus

values.name: onClickEvent
values.type: msg -> Attribute msg

values.name: optional
values.type: Bool -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: selectAllRows
values.type: State -> Bool -> State

values.name: showColumn
values.type: String -> State -> State

values.name: sort
values.type: List (Column a msg) -> State -> List (Row a) -> List (Row a)

values.name: sortLink
values.type: String -> String -> ColumnName -> (State -> msg) -> State -> Html msg

values.name: sortRows
values.type: (a -> String) -> List (Row a) -> List (Row a)

values.name: sortRowsFromStatus
values.type: SortStatus -> (a -> String) -> List (Row a) -> List (Row a)

values.name: stringColumn
values.comment: Standard column configuration to render the string data.
values.type: String -> (a -> String) -> Column a msg

values.name: stringWidthColumn
values.comment: Similar to `stringColumn` but with a custom width.
values.type: String -> String -> (a -> String) -> Column a msg

values.name: toolbarView
values.type: Config a msg -> State -> Html msg

values.name: toolbarViewSearch
values.type: (State -> msg) -> State -> Html msg

values.name: view
values.type: Config a msg -> State -> List (Row a) -> Html msg

values.type: (a -> String) -> a -> (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg)

values.type: a -> (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg)

values.name: viewCellText
values.type: (a -> String) -> a -> (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg)

values.name: viewColumnCheckbox
values.type: (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg)

values.type: (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg)

values.type: String -> (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Html msg)

values.type: String -> String -> String -> msg -> State -> Html msg

values.type: List (ColumnInternal a msg) -> (a -> String) -> (State -> msg) -> State -> List (Row a) -> Html msg
